description_long: This is a tall, cylindrical plant pot with a slightly flared rim and a smooth, matte finish. The upper portion of the pot is a lighter beige color, while the lower section is a darker brown, creating a subtle two-tone effect. The pot appears to be made of ceramic or concrete, giving it a sturdy and substantial look. Its surface is plain, with no visible decorative patterns or embellishments, emphasizing a minimalist and modern aesthetic. The interior is hollow, designed to hold soil and a plant, and the rim is thick and rounded for added durability. The overall form is simple yet elegant, suitable for both indoor and outdoor urban environments.
description: A tall, two-tone cylindrical plant pot with a smooth, matte finish and a minimalist design. The upper section is beige, and the lower section is a darker brown.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full height, flared rim, and clear two-tone color separation.
description_view_1: Side view with similar features, highlighting the smooth surface and cylindrical shape.
description_view_2: Rear view, nearly identical to the front, emphasizing the uniformity and lack of decorative detail.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the consistent two-tone color and plain surface.
attribute_placement_context: commonly used in modern urban parks or sidewalk gardens
